title: Omega Mag-Bind Bacterial DNA 96 Kit
author: Opentrons
description: This is a custom protocol that automates certain steps of the Omega Mag-Bind Bacterial DNA 96 Kit on the OT-2 robot. This kit allows rapid isolation of genomic DNA from bacterial samples. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: The total number of DNA samples. Samples must range between 1 (minimum) and 12 (maximum). * `P300 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `P1000 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height`: The height the magnets will raise on the magnetic module. ---
steps_raw: This is a custom protocol that automates certain steps of the Omega Mag-Bind Bacterial DNA 96 Kit on the OT-2 robot. This kit allows rapid isolation of genomic DNA from bacterial samples. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: The total number of DNA samples. Samples must range between 1 (minimum) and 12 (maximum). * `P300 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `P1000 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height`: The height the magnets will raise on the magnetic module. ---
Transfer 5 uL of RNase A and then mix thoroughly 20 times.
Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes.
Transfer 400 uL of MSL Buffer to all samples.
Transfer 10 uL of Mag-Bind particles to all samples and mix thoroughly 20 times.
Transfer 528 uL of Ethanol and mix thoroughly 20 times.
Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes.
Transfer 400 uL of SPM buffer to samples.
Resuspend magnetic beads and then incubate for 3 minutes at room temperature.
Air dry magnetic beads for 5 minutes.
Air dry beads for 15 minutes until they dry.
materials_raw: Slot 2: A1-A3 (Orange) contains MSL buffer. A7-A12 (Purple) contains SPM Buffer.
Slot 6: A1 (Green) containse RNase A. B1 (Blue) contains Mag-Bind beads.
